channel.title: Kai Reffert — Blog
channel.description: Posts on data science, machine learning, and time series forecasting.

item.title: The Probabilistic Time Series Forecasting Trap: How Modern Models Score Well While Seeing the Future Wrong
item.description: Making state-of-the-art LTSF models probabilistic is almost trivially easy. Understanding why the results can still be fundamentally broken—and what that reveals about the architecture of uncertainty—is not.

item.title: Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
item.description: Literature review of recent SOTA LTSF research.

item.title: Probabilistic Time Series Forecasting
item.description: Literature review of recent SOTA Probabilistic TSF research.
